Jethro Bosch Esq., Steven Adair Macdonald & Associates, PC, 415-956-6488, via zoom for plaintiff

DEFENDANT LINDA LOW , AN INDIVIDUAL, DOING BUSINESS AS CRAWSTATION/MALASA MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND is denied.

MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Apr-04-2024 Continued To May-07-24 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

Jaynry W. Mak; 415-307-9783; appearing as counsel for defendant Linda Low.
Jethro S. Busch; Steven Adair MacDonald & Partners, P.C.; 415-956-6488; appearing as counsel for plaintiffs Pik Wah Lee Fung and Hon Wing Fung.

Defendant contests the court's tentative decision. Ms. Mak states that she has recently obtained new information to support her motion that she did not know of at the time the motion was filed. Therefore Ms. Mak requests a continuance. The parties discuss a proposed briefing schedule. After reviewing the pleadings and listening to oral arguments the Court rules as follows:

DEFENDANT LINDA LOW MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT is continued to May 7, 2024 at 9:30am in Department 501 for defendant to file a supplemental declaration in support of their motion. Defendant's supplemental declaration to be filed no later than April 30, 2024. Plaintiffs' response to be filed no later than May 3, 2024. Both sides waive notice.

Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)
